title: Add co-founder contact number to About Us page

requirements.summary: Display Shushant Waghmare's contact number (+91 9156896495) as a clickable tel: link in his bio/profile card on the About Us page, styled consistently with Gaurav Saswade's contact number display
acceptanceCriteria: The number +91 9156896495 is visible in Shushant Waghmare's bio/profile card on the About Us page.
The number is rendered as a clickable <a href="tel:+919156896495"> link.
The styling matches the existing contact number display used for Gaurav Saswade's number on the same page.
No other pages or components are modified.

file_operations.description: Add the contact number +91 9156896495 as a clickable tel: link in Shushant Waghmare's profile card. Locate the existing contact number display for Gaurav Saswade in the owners/team section, then replicate the same HTML structure and styling for Shushant Waghmare's card. Ensure the tel: link uses the format href="tel:+919156896495" and the visual presentation matches Gaurav's contact number exactly (same icon, text size, color, and spacing).
